description_long: This object is a modern desktop printer with a rectangular, boxy shape and a hinged lid that opens upward to reveal a flatbed scanning surface. The front face features a paper output slot and a tray extending outward, likely for collecting printed pages. The top surface includes a control panel with several small, round buttons and indicator lights, suggesting basic operational controls. The exterior is primarily a matte dark gray, with subtle highlights and a smooth finish. The overall design is minimalistic, with clean lines and no visible branding or decorative elements. The printer appears to be constructed mainly from plastic, with some internal metal components and electronic parts.
description: A modern, boxy desktop printer with a hinged lid, flatbed scanner, and front paper tray, finished in matte dark gray with a simple control panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open lid, flatbed scanner, control panel, and extended paper output tray.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the printer, the open lid, and the protruding paper tray.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back surface and the upright lid, with no visible ports or features.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the control panel buttons, open lid, and the paper tray extending outward.
attribute_control_panel_design: Located on the top front right, the control panel is a narrow strip with several small, round buttons and indicator lights arranged in a row.
